result.cdp_note: Chrome --remote-debugging-port flag was ignored despite killing all chrome processes and restarting. CDP approach not available. Used mouse_event hardware click instead.
result.submission_details: Prompt typed via windows-mcp Type tool. Send button clicked via SetCursorPos(1150,477) + mouse_event. Input field cleared, blue stop button appeared confirming submission.
result.response_summary: Prompt was submitted successfully. Gemini showed processing state (blue stop button visible) but response never arrived. After extended wait, page reverted to initial home screen with no conversation history. This is consistent with APF blocking the HTTP/2 response stream (is_http2=1, GOAWAY frame).
result.dpi_discovery: 125% DPI scaling: Screenshot/Snapshot report physical pixels (1920x1080), SetCursorPos takes logical pixels (1536x864). Conversion: logical = physical / 1.25. Send button physical (1437,596) -> logical (1150,477).
result.comparison_with_108: Request #108 failed submission (15 methods attempted). #110 succeeded submission via mouse_event breakthrough, but response was blocked by APF. Same end result - no AI response delivered to user.
result.comparison_with_109: Notion (#109) also showed BLOCKED_SILENT with SSN pattern. Both Gemini and Notion responses blocked when SSN pattern detected.
result.note: Phase3-B6 Gemini retest. CDP method unavailable, used mouse_event instead. Submission succeeded but APF blocks the response stream. Page reset to home state after timeout.
